title: Sniffer Hearts
description: Just change the hearts to ones from a sniffer.
body:
This resource pack only changes the hearts in the gui. It does not change other elements.

![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/26b4a48af4065e645112d39fd80261bf5762af4b.png)

by italoo :D
